hi, i'm ivy

building experiences & storytelling with play

Presence AI

Led everything design for a consumer-facing realtime avatar application.

Proof of concept application with 4K DAU reached

Headroom

Acquired by Upwork in 2023. Sole designer on the platform for AI-powered collaborative experiences.

Designed a friendly interface for both technical and non-technical audiences around Headroom's API and SDK

Grand Theft Auto

Designed a web-based companion app letting players personalize in-game license plates out-of-console.

Crafted a narrative-based flow reaching 15M+ players from console to web

Museum of Arts & Design

Crafted an award-winning digital exhibition for the Burke Prize 2021, focused on accessibility and narrative storytelling.

Structured information from 14 unique artists into 4 media categories with dedicated components

Socratic

Rebranded the AI-powered Google app helping students with homework — 4.9★, grew from 120K to 750K DAU.

Defined the new visual system for the rebrand — graphic style, custom font, and Material-aligned color theme
